title: RC4385 ARCHIVED - Film or Video Production Services Tax Credit Guide for Form T1177 - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - RC4385 Film or Video Production Services Tax Credit Guide for Form T1177
Available for the years listed below:
- 2017 – Standard print PDF (rc4385-17e.pdf)
- 2013 – Standard print PDF (rc4385-13e.pdf)
- 2012 – Standard print PDF (rc4385-12e.pdf)
- 2008 – Standard print PDF (rc4385-08e.pdf)
- 2005 – Standard print PDF (rc4385-05e.pdf)
For more information, see our help file .
